    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    A() - Method in class canvas.CanvasData
     
    AbstractBrush - Class in brush
    Base class for all brushes used in WigglyPaint.
    AbstractBrush(int) - Constructor for class brush.AbstractBrush
    Constructs a brush with default color and no speed scaling.
    AbstractBrush(int, double) - Constructor for class brush.AbstractBrush
    Constructs a brush with base size and speed scaling.
    AbstractBrush(int, int, double) - Constructor for class brush.AbstractBrush
    Constructs a brush with full control over color and scaling.
    AbstractBrushTest - Class in grader
    This JUnit file contains a FULL COPY of the AbstractBrush logic so that we can test behavior WITHOUT modifying production code.
    AbstractBrushTest() - Constructor for class grader.AbstractBrushTest
     
    AbstractSpray - Class in brush
    Base class for spray-style brushes.
    AbstractSpray(int, double) - Constructor for class brush.AbstractSpray
    Creates a spray brush with a base size and speed scaling.
    accent - Variable in class utils.themes.Theme
    A bright highlight accent color.
    ACCENT - Static variable in class canvas.CanvasData
    Highlight/accent color.
    addListener(Runnable) - Static method in class utils.themes.ThemeManager
    Registers a callback to be executed whenever the theme changes.
    application - package application
